section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of depression and reports current chest pain. He also reports pain in the left hand.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This sentence restates patient-reported symptoms and past history without adding clinician interpretation or diagnostic synthesis, so it belongs in the Subjective section rather than Assessment.

This is framed as continuation of an existing medication without clear evidence of an active management decision or change; it more closely reflects current treatment status, which typically belongs in Assessment unless explicitly ordered as a new or adjusted plan.
